pirate101@DEBIAN13:~$ sudo waydroid shell -- sh -c '
echo "MODEL: $(getprop ro.product.model)"
echo "FINGERPRINT: $(getprop ro.build.fingerprint)"
echo "IMEI: $(getprop ro.ril.imei)"
echo "Daemon: $(/data/adb/magisk/magisk -v 2>&1)"
echo ""
echo "Modules:"
for m in /data/adb/modules/*/; do
  n=$(basename "$m")
  [ -f "$m/disable" ] && echo "  $n [DISABLED]" || echo "  $n [enabled]"
done
'
